concepts.title: Angle sum properties Part 3
concepts.conceptBody:
Angle sum properties

(i) $2\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}x=\left\{ \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 2x\sqrt{1-{{x}^{2}}} \right. & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\le x\le \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ \pi -\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 2x\sqrt{1-{{x}^{2}}} \right) & ,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\le x\le 1 \\ -\pi -\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 2x\sqrt{1-{{x}^{2}}} \right) & ,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-1\le x\le -\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ \end{array} \right.$

Let $\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\theta $ then $\text{sin}\theta =\text{x}$

so, $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sin}2\theta =2\text{sin}\theta \text{cos}\theta \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sin}2\theta =2\text{x}\sqrt{1-{{\text{x}}^{2}}}\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\,\left[ \because \text{cos}\theta =\sqrt{1-\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\theta } \right]$

or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }2\theta =\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 2x\sqrt{1-{{x}^{2}}} \right)\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }2\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}x=\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 2x\sqrt{1-{{x}^{2}}} \right)$

(ii) $3\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\left\{ \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 3\text{x}-4{{\text{x}}^{3}} \right) & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-\frac{1}{2}\le \text{x}\le \frac{1}{2} \\ \pi -\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 3\text{x}-4{{\text{x}}^{3}} \right) & ,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }\frac{1}{2}<\text{x}\le 1 \\ -\pi -\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 3\text{x}-4{{\text{x}}^{3}} \right) & ,\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-1\le \text{x}\le -\frac{1}{2} \\ \end{array} \right.$

Let $\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\theta $ then $\text{x}=\text{sin}\theta $

Now, $\text{sin}3\theta =3\text{sin}\theta -4\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{3}}\theta \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sin}3\theta =3x-4{{x}^{3}}$

or $3\theta =\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 3x-4{{x}^{3}} \right)\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }3\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}x=\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( 3x-4{{x}^{3}} \right)$

(iii) $2\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\left\{ \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 2{{\text{x}}^{2}}-1 \right) & \text{, }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }0\leq \text{x}\leq 1 \\ 2\pi -\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 2{{\text{x}}^{2}}-1 \right), & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-1\leq \text{x}\leq 0 \\ \end{array} \right.$

Let $\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\theta $ then $\text{x}=\text{cos}\theta $

so, $\text{cos}2\theta =2\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{2}}\theta -1\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cos}2\theta =2{{x}^{2}}-1$

or $2\theta =\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 2{{\text{x}}^{2}}-1 \right)\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }2\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 2{{\text{x}}^{2}}-1 \right)$

(iv) $3\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}x=\left\{ \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 4{{x}^{3}}-3x \right) & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }\frac{1}{2}\le x\leq 1 \\ 2\pi -\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 4{{x}^{3}}-3x \right), & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-\frac{1}{2}\leq x\leq \frac{1}{2} \\ 2\pi +\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 4{{x}^{3}}-3x \right), & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-1\le x-\frac{1}{2} \\ \end{array} \right.$

Let $\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\text{x}=\theta $ then $\text{x}=\text{cos}\theta $

Now, $\text{cos}3\theta =4\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{3}}\theta -3\text{cos}\theta \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cos}3\theta =4{{x}^{3}}-3x$

or $3\theta =\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 4{{x}^{3}}-3x \right)\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }3\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}x=\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( 4{{x}^{3}}-3x \right)$

Again, $\text{sin}2\theta =\frac{2\text{tan}\theta }{1+\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\theta }\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ sin}2\theta =\frac{2x}{1+{{x}^{2}}}\Rightarrow 2\theta =\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{2x}{1+{{x}^{2}}} \right)$

$\Rightarrow \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }2\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}x=\text{si}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{2x}{1+{{x}^{2}}} \right)$ and $\text{cos}2\theta =\frac{1-\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\theta }{1+\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\theta }$

or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ cos}2\theta =\frac{1-{{x}^{2}}}{1+{{x}^{2}}}\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }2\theta =\text{co}{{\text{s}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{1-{{x}^{2}}}{1+{{x}^{2}}} \right)$

(v) $3\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}x=\left\{ \begin{array}{*{35}{l}} \text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{3x-{{x}^{3}}}{1-3{{x}^{2}}} \right) & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }-\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}<x<\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \\ \pi +\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{3x-{{x}^{3}}}{1-3{{x}^{2}}} \right), & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }x>\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \\ -\pi +\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{3x-{{x}^{3}}}{1-3{{x}^{2}}} \right), & \text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ if }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }x<-\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}} \\ \end{array} \right.$

Let $\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\text{x}=0$ then $\text{x}=\text{tan}\theta $

Now, $\text{tan}3\theta =\frac{3\text{tan}\theta -\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{3}}\theta }{1-3\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{2}}\theta }\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ tan}3\theta =\frac{3x-{{x}^{3}}}{1-3{{x}^{2}}}\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }$ or $\text{ }\!\!~\!\!\text{ }3\theta =\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left[ \frac{3x-{{x}^{3}}}{1-3{{x}^{2}}} \right]$

or $3\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}x=\text{ta}{{\text{n}}^{-1}}\left( \frac{3x-{{x}^{3}}}{1-3{{x}^{2}}} \right)$

examples.title: The solution set of the equation $\sin ^{-1} x=2 \tan ^{-1} x$ is
If $4 \sin ^{-1} x+\cos ^{-1} x=\pi$, then $x$ is equal to
